summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Sales Reports module with external PostgreSQL database. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend mostly working with some chart rendering issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height rendering warnings - charts show negative dimensions
Page loading timeout issues - takes longer than 25 seconds to load

integration_issues.issue: Recharts components showing width(-1) and height(-1) errors in console
affected_selectors: All chart containers in dashboard, products, stores, clients pages

passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints working correctly
Dashboard page loads with KPIs, charts, and data
Sidebar navigation works between all 5 pages
Products page loads with tabs and export buttons
Stores page loads with chart and table
Clients page loads with table and detail view
Filter dropdowns work correctly (marca, tipo, store)
Page layouts and UI structure correct
Export buttons present on all pages
Real data loading from external PostgreSQL database
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issues in recharts components - charts are showing negative width/height dimensions. Consider adding proper container sizing or minWidth/minHeight properties to chart containers. Sales Analysis page loading performance could be optimized.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality works, minor chart rendering issues
